caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with bold text on it. The setting appears to be a casual, possibly retail environment, as evidenced by the clothing racks and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. The man seems engaged in conversation, occasionally looking off to the side, suggesting he might be interacting with someone off-camera or responding to questions. The overall atmosphere is relaxed yet professional, indicative of an informal but structured discussion.
